reviews.comment:
Siempre de ida y regreso a buenos aires paramos allí, esta vez a la mañana los baños sucios, al de regreso por la tarde muy limpios

(Translated by Google)
We always stop there on our way to and from Buenos Aires; this time in the morning the bathrooms were dirty, but on the way back in the afternoon they were very clean.

reviews.comment:
En la cafetería las chicas nos atendieron muy bien y nos sirvieron un cappuccino delicioso! Tienen combos para comer dulce o salado según tu gusto. Lugar muy limpio, los baños impecables. Los felicito!

(Translated by Google)
The staff at the café were very attentive and served us a delicious cappuccino! They have combo meals with sweet or savory options to suit your taste. The place is very clean, and the restrooms are spotless. Congratulations!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN1dWRPQXlnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Una de las paradas clásicas en el camino a la costa a su regreso.  Suele haber mucha gente . Tiene un muy buen parque para descansar .

(Translated by Google)
One of the classic stops on the way back to the coast. It's usually quite busy. It has a very nice park for relaxing.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN1NmZlV0V3EAE

reviews.comment:
Lugar especial para descansar luego de algún viaje x la zona, donde se puede desayunar,almorzar y demás,precios acorde calidad.Tiene estacionamiento gratuito, arboleda para descansar bajo su sombra, como también mesas y asientos.

(Translated by Google)
A special place to relax after a trip around the area, where you can have breakfast, lunch, and more, with prices that reflect the quality. It has free parking, a grove of trees to rest in the shade, as well as tables and chairs.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN1cWZ1cFdBEAE
